description: Retargeting campaign with high CVR audience, optimise for CPA
user_message: We're running a retargeting campaign for 30-day website visitors. Budget is $500. Target CPA is $15. Which slots should we prioritise and what should we bid?

ground_truth.reasoning: Retargeting audiences have 3-5x higher CVR. Social slot has higher volume but display has better CPM efficiency for this segment.
